sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES port

special_mechanics.name: motorcycle gliding vehicle
special_mechanics.description: Player rides a gliding motorcycle-like vehicle for movement and collision

special_mechanics.name: terrain variation
special_mechanics.description: Second area features rough terrain replacing motorcycle riders; final area has Dinosaur Tank battles

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides game overview and genre information but contains no quantitative movement, physics, or sub-pixel system data. Game is an isometric shooter with motorcycle-based gameplay; precise physics parameters are not documented in available sources.
